description: An on-chain AI battle RPG on Initia where creativity is your weapon. Type prompts to fight monsters, earn CLASH tokens, mint victory NFTs, and compete in PvP arenas — all on-chain.

contracts.clash_token: Fungible token (CLASH) rewarded for battle victories
contracts.game_arena: On-chain leaderboard, score recording, CLASH balance tracking, PvP wager system
contracts.victory_nft: NFT collection minted on battle victories with metadata
